workflow.name: etcd HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate etcd HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare etcd inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/etcd-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[etcd]
10.31.97.11 role=etcd name=etcd-01
10.31.97.12 role=etcd name=etcd-02
10.31.97.13 role=etcd name=etcd-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install etcd container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/etcd-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: etcd
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/etcd-inventory.ini /tmp/etcd-runtime.yml

data.label: Render etcd cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/etcd-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: etcd
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/etcd
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/etcd/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            etcd:
              image: quay.io/coreos/etcd:v3.5.16
              container_name: octastack-etcd
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "etcd --advertise-client-urls=http://0.0.0.0:2379 --listen-client-urls=http://0.0.0.0:2379"
              ports:
                - "2379:2379"
                - "2380:2380"
              volumes:
                - data:/etcd-data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy etcd cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/etcd-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/etcd/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/etcd/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/etcd/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/etcd-inventory.ini /tmp/etcd-deploy.yml

data.label: Document etcd topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/etcd-topology.md <<'EOF'
# etcd HA topology

Members:
- etcd-01: 10.31.97.11 (etcd)
- etcd-02: 10.31.97.12 (etcd)
- etcd-03: 10.31.97.13 (etcd)

This example deploys one etcd container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/etcd-topology.md

data.label: Validate etcd cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/etcd-inventory.ini etcd -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'

data.label: etcd HA health check
data.command: docker exec octastack-etcd etcdctl endpoint health
